query:
INSERT INTO projects (
  quotationId, 
  clientId, 
  name, 
  workType, 
  status, 
  quotationApprovedAt, 
  createdBy, 
  tentativeInstallDate, 
  isInstallDateOfficial, 
  totalAmount, 
  createdAt, 
  updatedAt
) 
SELECT 
  q.id,
  q.clientId,
  CONCAT(q.quotationNumber, ' - Cliente'),
  'cocina',
  'cotizacion_aprobada',
  NOW(),
  (SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'super_admin' LIMIT 1),
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 DAY),
  false,
  q.total,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM quotations q
WHERE q.quotationNumber LIKE '%1771624102463%'
LIMIT 1;
